metadata.description: MongoDB best practices skills for AI coding agents: schema design, query/index optimization, search, AI/vector search, and transaction consistency.

plugins.name: mongodb-agent-skills
plugins.description: MongoDB best practices with 153 rules across 5 skills: Schema Design (30 rules), Query & Index Optimization (46 rules), Search (24 rules), Vector Search/AI (33 rules), and Transactions/Consistency (20 rules). Covers anti-patterns, data modeling, indexing, aggregation, search relevance, vector search, RAG, transaction retries, and ACID consistency patterns.
